title: スランプで大ピンチ～？響け大地の聲よ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after the tryouts, I see Copano Rickey on the training
track.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huff! Puff! Wood, fire, earth, metal, auspicious sign! Wood, fire, earth, metal, auspicious sign!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whew... phew... That should be enough. Next up is the woodchip
track!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! Yeah, since I put up such a pitiful fight in the tryouts, I
thought I should pour even more qi into my training!
choice_data_list: Is this because of what Hokko Tarumae said?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What? No, of course not. I'm not training harder just because she told
me to.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This is my everyday routine! ☆ Feng shui doesn't grant you wishes. It
shows you where to channel your effort!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she does put in effort. It sounds like she doesn't leave everything
up to feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My big loss in the tryouts hasn't changed my willingness to train hard,
but it did get me thinking... And I've realized that I've got to change
some things up!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm still shocked I couldn't hear the earth's voice. If this keeps up, how
am I supposed to be useful to anyone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the first time I've heard her talk about being useful to others.
She must have a reason for racing that I don't know about.
choice_data_list: Do you have time to talk some more?
Do you have time to talk some more?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah, sure! I've got plenty. ♪ I was just about to take a break anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We walk as we talk, until we end up at the park nearby the academy.

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text: Oh, Rickey! It's great to see you! Thanks for your advice last time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hi! How's the Chinese restaurant doing? Did the advice work?

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
Oh, business is booming! After I moved the trees in the garden and
got orange ramen bowls like you said...

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
The ambience must have improved, because customers started
flowing in. Thanks to that, I finally got my bedridden father on board.

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
I understand that he wants to keep the shop looking the
old-fashioned way, but it's also important to have the courage to
change sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad I can continue the shop he passed down to me. Even a
long-time customer who's known me since I was a kid shed a tear of
joy for us.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's great news! The shop closing down wouldn't have made
anyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Blowing wind is better than sitting and waiting! If I gave you even a
little bit of courage, then I'm glad!

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Owner
text_block_list.text:
You did! I'll come to you again for more feng shui advice for my old
man and my regulars!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The restaurant owner walks away, bowing all the way.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, as you can see, feng shui can pull you out of tough spots and help
you make decisions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's worked for me, and I've seen it work for lots of other Umamusume
too. A gentle push from feng shui can be all it takes for things to go
smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want more people to know about feng shui—I want
everyone to be happy! It empowers you to avoid misfortune and
invite happiness!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've got to win races and prove how powerful it is to
everyone! ♪
choice_data_list: So you're running for everyone's sake?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That might be a bit of an exaggeration, but of course I want to see
everyone happy. Don't you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But nobody will be convinced if I can't win. I can't believe I couldn't
hear the earth's voice during such an important race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm impressed by her desire to help others, but I'm still curious...
choice_data_list: What do you mean by "the earth's voice"?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that? Well, I call it a voice, but it's not like I actually hear a
voice. That's just what it feels like.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I was in elementary school the first time I heard the earth's voice. It
was sports day, and I was in the middle of a race...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It was like the earth was telling me how to run from its perspective. I
could feel the flow of qi and predict my opponents' next moves.
Thanks to that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I went on a winning streak. By having my body become one with
nature and all of creation, I knew exactly how to race and finished
first every time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But I couldn't hear that voice in the tryouts the other day. Maybe I
was too nervous, or maybe I didn't prepare the space enough
beforehand.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui is about becoming one with nature, but for some reason, it
felt distant. I couldn't do it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks troubled, so I want to do something to help. If it's nature
she wants to feel closer to, then...
choice_data_list: Want to go on a little trip tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh, a trip? Where do you have in mind?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yay, a picnic! ♪ I needed this change of pace! Mind if I shout into the
mountains?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆ Super happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I bring Copano Rickey to the mountains, thinking this might be the
perfect place for her to figure out why she lost touch with the earth's
voice.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! In places like this, it's easy to see the dragon veins. The flow of
qi feels so full of life!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Can't you feel the qi flowing along the mountain ridges? Those
are the dragon veins!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The exit of a dragon vein is called a dragon hollow. When the qi from
the mountains comes down to the beach and erupts, that location
becomes a power spot.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: If I concentrate...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can sense it strongly today... The dragon hollow's qi is swirling with
energy, enveloping everything.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Even if I close my eyes. I can see the whole shore. And the earth's
voice is as clear to me as ever.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I feel nature right now, so there's nothing wrong with my senses.
So why couldn't I hear its voice during the tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Good question. If it's not a problem with her senses, then why can she
hear the earth's voice at the beach, but not on the racetrack?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She said she went undefeated at her elementary school's sports day,
which means she could connect to the voice on school grounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she can hear it on the school grounds and at the beach, but not on
the racetrack. Could that be the key to finding the answer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to pinpoint what sets the track apart using my limited knowledge
of feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer? Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Cracked what?
choice_data_list:
The reason you couldn't hear the earth's voice
during the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What?! Really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If my predictions are correct...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then she should be able to show off her full power in the next race.
